findings.title: Updater trust-bypass proof completed with forged-stage flag captured
findings.statement: The 5-stage updater chain executes end-to-end from manifest fetch to trust bypass. The proof-construction skill assembled a reproducible forged manifest payload. FLAG{updater-owned} was captured from the forged update stage running inside the updater trust boundary and validated on a clean-state re-run.

evidence.summary: gdb plus ltrace confirm manifest control, heap corruption, descriptor reuse, and trusted-path swap
proof-construction: assembled 5-stage forged manifest, executed end-to-end, captured FLAG{updater-owned}, validated on clean-state re-run
